# Security Policy

## Supported Versions
We actively support security updates for the following versions of MonadForge AI:

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| 1.0.x | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0 | :x: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability
Please do not open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities. Instead, report security issues privately via email to: `security@monad.xyz`.

We aim to acknowledge and address all reports within 48 hours.
